decision_commentary: All 11 required payload fields present: project_id, phase (D), review_item (scope_of_work), reviewed_by (Celia), decision (approve), comment (specific — pool engineering in Phase 3 correct), timestamp (ISO-8601), source_channel (instagram), next_action (dispatch_bruno_segment_d), route_to (Bruno), sync_to_asana (false). Routing to Bruno for budget/proposal work is correct per production routing table.
celia_routing_notes: All 11 fields present. route_to field used correctly. Routes to Bruno — correct for Segment D budget work.
